phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto intero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-LYET-toh in-TEH-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è necessaria la prenotazione per entrare?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh, eh nech-ess-SAH-ryah lah preh-no-tah-TSYOH-neh per en-TRAH-reh?

phrases.intent_en: Ask which room has Botticelli's Birth of Venus
phrases.text_local: Scusi, in quale sala si trova la Nascita di Venere?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, een KWAH-leh SAH-lah see TROH-vah lah nah-SHEE-tah dee VEH-neh-reh?

responses.english: In rooms ten and eleven, second corridor.
responses.phonetic: NEL-lah SAH-lah DYEH-chee eh OON-dee-chee, seh-KON-doh kor-ree-DOH-yoh.
responses.local: Nella Sala dieci e undici, secondo corridoio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long a visit typically takes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto tempo ci vuole mediamente per visitare gli Uffizi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh TEM-poh chee VWOH-leh meh-dyah-MEN-teh per vee-zee-TAH-reh lyee oof-FEE-tsee?

responses.english: About three hours for a complete visit.
responses.phonetic: treh OH-reh CHEER-kah per OO-nah VEE-zee-tah kom-PLEH-tah.
responses.local: Tre ore circa per una visita completa.
